name: iyeris
description: A beautiful cross-platform file explorer built with Tauri, featuring a simple yet advanced modern design.

scripts.tauri:dev: npm run sync-version && npm run copy-vendor && tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && node scripts/tauri-build.js --require-tauri-signing
scripts.lint: npm run lint:app && npm run lint:test
scripts.licenses: npm run licenses:npm && npm run licenses:cargo
scripts.b: git fetch origin && git reset --hard && git clean -fd && git switch -C beta origin/beta && git reset --hard origin/beta && git clean -fd && npm run vi
scripts.r: git fetch origin && git reset --hard && git clean -fd && git switch -C main origin/main && git reset --hard origin/main && git clean -fd && npm run vi && npm run gitprune:force
scripts.u: npm update && cd ./src-tauri && cargo update && cd .. && npm run workspace:bootstrap && npm run format && npm run test:all
scripts.rust:target:win: npm run rust:target:win:x64 && npm run rust:target:win:arm64
scripts.rust:target:mac: npm run rust:target:mac:x64 && npm run rust:target:mac:arm64
scripts.rust:target:linux: npm run rust:target:linux:x64 && npm run rust:target:linux:arm64
scripts.build:win:x64: npm run rust:target:win:x64 && npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run build:win:x64:prepared
scripts.build:win:arm64: npm run rust:target:win:arm64 && npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run build:win:arm64:prepared
scripts.build:win: npm run build:win:x64 && npm run build:win:arm64
scripts.build:msstore:win:x64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/tauri-build.js --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle
scripts.build:msstore:win:arm64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/tauri-build.js --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle
scripts.build:msstore:win: npm run build:msstore:win:x64 && npm run build:msstore:win:arm64
scripts.build:msstore: npm run build:msstore:win && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/msstore-pack.js
scripts.build:msstore:x64: npm run build:msstore:win:x64 && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/msstore-pack.js x64
scripts.build:msstore:arm64: npm run build:msstore:win:arm64 && dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/msstore-pack.js arm64
scripts.build:mac:universal: npm run rust:target:mac && npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run icons:normalize && npm run build:mac:universal:prepared
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run build:linux:x64:prepared
scripts.build:linux:arm64: npm run sync-version && npm run licenses && npm run build:linux:arm64:prepared
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:linux:x64 && npm run build:linux:arm64
scripts.release:prepare: npm run workspace:prepare && npm run dist:clean-release-artifacts
scripts.release:finalize: dotenv -e .env -- node scripts/post-release-assets.js --finalize-release-assets && git fetch origin && git reset --hard @{u} && git clean -fd
scripts.release:win: npm run prerelease:prepare && npm run release:prepare && npm run release:win:continue
scripts.release:mac: npm run prerelease:prepare && npm run release:prepare && npm run release:mac:continue
scripts.release:mac:ssh: npm run mac:ssh:keychain && npm run release:mac
scripts.release:linux:x64: npm run prerelease:prepare && npm run release:prepare && npm run release:linux:x64:continue
scripts.release:linux:arm64: npm run prerelease:prepare && npm run release:prepare && npm run release:linux:arm64:continue
scripts.setup:deb: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y build-essential curl wget file libgtk-3-dev libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev libjavascriptcoregtk-4.1-dev libsoup-3.0-dev libglib2.0-dev libssl-dev libayatana-appindicator3-dev librsvg2-dev patchelf rpm flatpak flatpak-builder && sudo flatpak remote-add --if-not-exists flathub https://flathub.org/repo/flathub.flatpakrepo && rustup toolchain install stable --profile minimal && rustup default stable
scripts.setup:flatpak: sudo flatpak install -y flathub org.gnome.Platform//49 org.gnome.Sdk//49 org.freedesktop.Sdk.Extension.node22//25.08 org.freedesktop.Sdk.Extension.rust-stable//25.08
scripts.build:win:prepared: npm run build:win:x64:prepared && npm run build:win:arm64:prepared
scripts.build:linux:prepared: npm run build:linux:x64:prepared && npm run build:linux:arm64:prepared
scripts.workspace:bootstrap: npm run rust:update && npm ci && npm run sync-version && node scripts/update-metainfo.js
scripts.workspace:prepare: npm run workspace:bootstrap && npm run test:all
scripts.release:win:continue: npm run release:session:verify && npm run release:draft && npm run rust:target:win && npm run build:win:prepared && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:win:resume: npm run prerelease:prepare && npm run release:win:continue
scripts.release:mac:continue: npm run release:session:verify && npm run release:wait-draft && npm run rust:target:mac && npm run build:mac:universal:prepared && npm run build:mac:zip && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:mac:resume: npm run prerelease:prepare && npm run release:mac:continue
scripts.release:mac:ssh:resume: npm run mac:ssh:keychain && npm run release:mac:resume
scripts.release:linux:x64:continue: npm run release:session:verify && npm run release:wait-draft && npm run rust:target:linux:x64 && npm run build:linux:x64:prepared && npm run flatpak:clean && npm run flatpak:bundle && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:linux:x64:resume: npm run prerelease:prepare && npm run release:linux:x64:continue
scripts.release:linux:arm64:continue: npm run release:session:verify && npm run release:wait-draft && npm run rust:target:linux:arm64 && npm run build:linux:arm64:prepared && npm run release:sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:linux:arm64:resume: npm run prerelease:prepare && npm run release:linux:arm64:continue

author: BurntToasters <code@rosie.run>
